title: panax japonicus var. major
intro: Panax japonicus var. major, also known as the Chinese ginseng or Japanese ginseng, is a species of plant in the genus Panax and is a type of ginseng. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The health benefits of Panax japonicus var. major include improved cognitive function, enhanced physical performance, and reduced symptoms of fatigue and anxiety. Panax japonicus var. major is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
